_comment: Source: Michigan MDHHS Section 8-12 Communications Failure (Revised 12/27/2022, MDHHS Reviewed 2022). Base Michigan template — MCA-specific selections not configured.
protocol_reference: Michigan System Protocol Section 8-12: Communications Failure — MDHHS Approved 12/27/2022
purpose: Govern EMS provider actions when communications with medical control or dispatch are lost or unavailable. Providers must be able to operate safely and effectively using standing protocols when communications fail. Communications failure does not suspend the obligation to provide care — providers must act in the patient's best interest using protocol-directed care.

sections.title: Response to Communications Failure
points: If unable to reach Medical Control: attempt all available communication methods (primary radio, alternate radio channel, cell phone, text, hospital landline)
Do NOT withhold time-sensitive care while attempting to restore communications — follow standing protocols
Document all communication attempts in PCR, including time of attempts and methods used
If communications cannot be restored, proceed per standing protocols for the patient's condition

sections.title: Standing Order Operations During Communications Failure
sections.reference: Michigan Protocol 8-12: Communications Failure — Standing Orders
points: All STANDING ORDER treatments in protocols may be performed without medical control contact
Medical control ONLINE ORDER requirements: if communications fail and an online order is required, use clinical judgment and standing protocols to guide care

Procedures requiring online medical control contact may be performed on a one-time basis without contact if: patient condition is life-threatening, all communication attempts have failed, and delay would result in patient harm
Document the circumstances fully in the PCR — the medical director will review

sections.title: Transport During Communications Failure
points: Transport to most appropriate facility based on patient condition and MCA destination protocols
Attempt to restore communications en route
Notify receiving facility of patient status and estimated arrival time — use all available communication methods
Provide full verbal report to receiving facility upon arrival

sections.title: Reporting
points: Report communications failure to MCA and medical director as soon as possible after the call
Document the following in PCR: time communications lost, methods attempted, time communications restored or confirmed lost, all clinical decisions made under communications failure

deterioration_flags: Life-threatening condition requiring online order and communications have failed — use standing protocol and clinical judgment; document fully; report to medical director
scope_notes: Communications failure does NOT suspend patient care obligations
Attempt all available communication methods before declaring failure
Standing orders continue without restriction during communications failure
Online order required but comms failed: proceed clinically if life-threatening; document fully
Transport to most appropriate facility per standing protocols
Report failure to MCA and medical director after call
